role: Reformist politician and journalist; member of the 6th Majlis
bio: Mohsen Armin is a reformist politician, journalist, and key figure in the [Mojahedin of the Islamic Revolution Organization](/orgs/mojahedin-of-islamic-revolution-organization). He served as a member of parliament in the reformist 6th [Majlis](/orgs/islamic-consultative-assembly). He has been active in political journalism and the reform movement, advocating for political openness and democratic governance within the Islamic Republic framework.
